summary: The diff implements all four requirements. REQ-1 (persist label settings via Zustand persist middleware), REQ-2 (prefix mappings included in persisted state), REQ-3 (save printer identifiers to localStorage on connect and auto-reconnect on app open), and REQ-4 (duplicate serial detection with inline error, error sound, blocked print, cleared 2nd serial, preserved 1st serial) all appear to be implemented. Evidence is present across labelSettingsStore.ts (persist middleware), usbCpclTransport.ts (save/load printer identifier), printerService.ts (autoReconnectPrinter, saveLastPrinterIdentifier), App.tsx (autoReconnectPrinter called on unlock), and ScanPrintTab.tsx (duplicate serial check, playSound('error'), duplicateSerialError state).
